body.title: Review word graph / trail traversal for optimization opportunities
body.result: Research complete — see findings below. 4 follow-up tickets created.
body.description: After pe-observe is running: review the actual traversal patterns used in OBSERVE two-pass, SITUATE, and HYPOTHESIZE context loading. Look for redundant loads, missed facia opportunities, and cases where we load too much. Data-driven optimization — run first, then tune.
